title: Who and why
pedagogy: Vocabulary: ใคร (true คร cluster: low ค + live ใ◌ → mid), ทำไม (low ท + live ◌ำ → mid; low ม + live ไ◌ → mid — no tone mark, unlike ไม่). Slot rule review: question words sit where the answer goes; ทำไม can also lead the sentence.

exercises.title: Your question toolkit is almost full
body: You already ask what (อะไร), where (ไหน), and how much (เท่าไหร่). This unit hands you the rest of the set.
ใคร is “who” — same คร cluster as ครับ. ทำไม is “why”, literally “do what?”.
Spot the trap: ทำไม ends in ไม (no tone mark, mid tone) — not ไม่ (mai ek, falling), the “not” you know. One little mark, opposite jobs.

exercises.explanation: ทำไมครับ — the particle keeps a bare “why?” from sounding like a challenge.
